props.name: width
props.description: The width of the hover element.

props.name: height
props.description: The height of the hover element.

props.name: background
props.description: The background color of the element.

props.name: borderRadius
props.description: The border radius of the element.

props.name: borderColor
props.description: The border color of the element.

props.name: children
props.description: The content to display inside the glare hover element.

props.name: glareColor
props.description: The color of the glare effect (hex format).

props.name: glareOpacity
props.description: The opacity of the glare effect (0-1).

props.name: glareAngle
props.description: The angle of the glare effect in degrees.

props.name: glareSize
props.description: The size of the glare effect as a percentage (e.g. 250 = 250%).

props.name: transitionDuration
props.description: The duration of the transition in milliseconds.

props.name: playOnce
props.description: If true, the glare only animates on hover and doesn't return on mouse leave.
